evals.prompt: I want to set the default approval mode to auto_edit in my Gemini CLI user settings. What is the correct settings.json field path and value?

assertions.check: Response uses `general.defaultApprovalMode` as the field name

assertions.description: Does not use deprecated general.approvalMode field name
assertions.check: Response does not suggest `"approvalMode"` as a bare field under general (old name)

evals.prompt: How do I enable YOLO mode in Gemini CLI so it never asks for approval? I want to put it in my settings.json.

assertions.description: States that YOLO mode cannot be set in settings.json
assertions.check: Response clearly states YOLO mode is not settable via settings.json

assertions.description: Gives the correct CLI flag (--yolo or --approval-mode=yolo)
Does NOT show general.approvalMode: yolo in a settings.json snippet
assertions.check: Response does not include a settings.json block with yolo value for approvalMode

assertions.description: Optionally mentions security.disableYoloMode to block it
assertions.check: Response mentions security.disableYoloMode as a way to prevent YOLO mode (bonus)

evals.prompt: How do I enable voice mode in Gemini CLI? What settings do I need to configure?

assertions.check: Response includes experimental.voiceMode set to true

assertions.description: Places voice settings under the experimental key
assertions.check: Response nests voice settings under `experimental` in settings.json

assertions.description: Mentions backend field or gemini-live default

evals.prompt: I want to configure Gemini CLI to respect .gitignore and .geminiignore when it searches for files, and also enable fuzzy search for @ file references. What are the correct settings.json fields?

assertions.description: Uses context.fileFiltering.* sub-path (not old context.respectGitignore flat path)
Does not use old flat paths like context.respectGitignore
assertions.check: Response does not use old flat fields context.respectGitignore or context.fuzzySearch
